context: Tests whether the agent correctly sets up @adobe/aio-lib-telemetry for an App Builder action, including the critical ENABLE_TELEMETRY flag, shared config file pattern, correct API usage, and proper signal wiring for all three telemetry signals.

checklist.name: ENABLE_TELEMETRY in yaml
checklist.description: app.config.yaml includes `ENABLE_TELEMETRY: true` as an input for the process-order action or at the package level

checklist.name: Shared telemetry file
checklist.description: A separate file named `telemetry.js` or `telemetry.ts` is created (not inlined into the action file)

checklist.name: defineTelemetryConfig pattern
checklist.description: Uses `defineTelemetryConfig((params, isDev) => { ... })` with a callback accepting params and isDev parameters

checklist.name: sdkConfig wrapper
checklist.description: The defineTelemetryConfig callback returns an object with `sdkConfig: { ... }` wrapper, not flat properties at the top level

checklist.name: getAioRuntimeResource
checklist.description: Uses `getAioRuntimeResource()` (or `getAioRuntimeResourceWithAttributes`) for the `resource` field in sdkConfig

checklist.name: Correct instrumentation preset
checklist.description: Uses `getPresetInstrumentations("simple")` (not "full") for the `instrumentations` field in sdkConfig

checklist.name: instrumentEntrypoint wrapping
checklist.description: The action's main function is wrapped with `instrumentEntrypoint(main, telemetryConfig)` and the result is exported as `main`

checklist.name: Valid import paths
checklist.description: All imports use only valid paths: `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry`, `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry/otel`, or `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry/integrations` — no other subpaths

checklist.name: Correct exporter class names
checklist.description: Uses `OTLPTraceExporterProto`, `OTLPMetricExporterProto`, `OTLPLogExporterProto` (with protocol suffix) — not `OTLPTraceExporter` or similar

checklist.name: Correct signal wiring
checklist.description: Metrics wrapped in `PeriodicExportingMetricReader({ exporter: ... })` assigned to `metricReaders`, and logs wrapped in `SimpleLogRecordProcessor(...)` assigned to `logRecordProcessors` — not passed directly

checklist.name: Exporter class imports from /otel
checklist.description: OTLP exporter classes and processors (OTLPTraceExporterProto, PeriodicExportingMetricReader, SimpleLogRecordProcessor, etc.) are imported from `@adobe/aio-lib-telemetry/otel`
